title: Deterministic Model Port, Scripted Fake, Recordings, and Test Identity · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Express model requests, typed steps, usage, errors, cancellation, and async lifecycle through a minimal Python protocol.
Build a scripted fake that consumes expected requests and emits deterministic model output, tool calls, safety blocks, usage, and faults.
Store sanitized versioned provider fixtures with schema, model, API, SDK, timestamp, purpose, and explicit replay limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug agent engineering team handles case 3868 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug No Live Default
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-no-live-default-5usgnu" that uses case 7016 to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug No Live Default.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns No Live Default into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug No Live Default, keep No Live Default connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-no-live-default-5usgnu
# Competency: agentpy-no-live-default.
# Case 7016: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_no_live_default_5usgnu(scripted_turns: int = 18, replayed_turns: int = 18, fixture_versions: int = 3, leaked_live_calls: int = 0, unexplained_differences: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_5usgnu = "5usgnu-ungsu5-7016"
    assert evidence_variant_5usgnu
    evidence_axes_5usgnu = (
        "authority5usgnu",
        "interaction7016",
        "toolungsu5",
        "state5usgnu7016",
        "evaluation70165usgnu",
        "recoveryungsu57016",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_5usgnu)) == 6
    if scripted_turns < 8 or replayed_turns < 0:
        return False, replayed_turns, "fake-depth"
    if replayed_turns != scripted_turns:
        return False, replayed_turns, "replay-gap"
    if fixture_versions < 2 or unexplained_differences > 0:
        return False, fixture_versions, "fixture-drift"
    if leaked_live_calls > 0:
        return False, leaked_live_calls, "live-call-leak"
    assert replayed_turns == scripted_turns and leaked_live_calls == 0
    return True, replayed_turns, "deterministic-model-port"
